## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX.ai's AI-powered content marketing services to Rimkus leadership and explore potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rimkus lacks strong SEO and AEO presence, despite being a market leader in consulting services](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai offers a comprehensive content strategy and execution service, leveraging AI and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [The service includes an 8-week strategy sprint ($20k) followed by ongoing execution ($9k-$15k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai's approach focuses on optimizing content for both traditional search and AI-powered answers](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)

## Topics

### Rimkus Business Overview

  - [Consulting company covering proactive and reactive business aspects](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Reactive side: forensics, accident investigations, legal testimony](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Proactive side: Built Environment Services (BES), including roof consulting](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Market leader in revenue, but lacking online visibility](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### GrowthX.ai Service Overview

  - [Four-layer approach: strategy, AI workflow, expert editors, execution](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint to develop content strategy and start execution](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [Ongoing content creation and optimization using AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Focus on creating content that performs well in both search and AI answers](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Customizable process to accommodate industry-specific requirements and legal reviews](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Context engineering to understand client's business and audience](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [Topic cluster development aligned with business goals](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [AI-assisted research, writing, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Human expert oversight and editing throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [Optimization for both traditional SEO and AI-powered search results](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)

### Pricing and Timeline

  - [8-week strategy sprint: $20,000](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Ongoing execution: $9,000 to $15,000 per month](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Currently booking 4-6 weeks out for new client kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX.ai to send meeting recording to Rimkus team](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
  - [Schedule a deep dive session next week for a more detailed audit and ideas presentation](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
  - [Vitali to validate budget with Rimkus finance team](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Explore how GrowthX.ai's services can be specifically applied to Rimkus' needs](https://fathom.video/share/yYhdsRdbEBbcg9-XxJU1iYZFPy1e5pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
